paragraphs.text:
%sql
SHOW TABLES IN labour_shock

%sql
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS labour_shock.country_year_index

%sql
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS labour_shock.core_long

%sql
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS labour_shock.sea_cluster

%sql
CREATE EXTERNAL TABLE labour_shock.country_year_index (
    country_code STRING,
    country_name STRING,
    is_benchmark STRING,
    year INT,
    evi_main DOUBLE,
    evi_robust_010 DOUBLE,
    evi_robust_020 DOUBLE,
    dri DOUBLE,
    risk_gap DOUBLE,
    risk_gap_robust_010 DOUBLE,
    risk_gap_robust_020 DOUBLE
)
ROW FORMAT DELIMITED
FIELDS TERMINATED BY ','
STORED AS TEXTFILE
LOCATION '/user/maria_dev/labour_shock/hive/index'

msg.data:

paragraphs.text:
%sql
CREATE EXTERNAL TABLE labour_shock.core_long (
    country_code STRING,
    country_name STRING,
    is_benchmark STRING,
    indicator_code STRING,
    indicator_group STRING,
    year INT,
    value DOUBLE
)
ROW FORMAT DELIMITED
FIELDS TERMINATED BY ','
STORED AS TEXTFILE
LOCATION '/user/maria_dev/labour_shock/hive/core'

%sql
CREATE EXTERNAL TABLE labour_shock.sea_cluster (
    country_code STRING,
    country_name STRING,
    evi_main_avg DOUBLE,
    dri_avg DOUBLE,
    risk_gap_avg DOUBLE,
    cluster INT,
    cluster_label STRING
)
ROW FORMAT DELIMITED
FIELDS TERMINATED BY ','
STORED AS TEXTFILE
LOCATION '/user/maria_dev/labour_shock/hive/cluster'

%sql
SHOW TABLES IN labour_shock

paragraphs.text:
%sql
SELECT 'country_year_index' AS table_name, COUNT(*) AS row_count
FROM labour_shock.country_year_index
UNION ALL
SELECT 'core_long' AS table_name, COUNT(*) AS row_count
FROM labour_shock.core_long
UNION ALL
SELECT 'sea_cluster' AS table_name, COUNT(*) AS row_count
FROM labour_shock.sea_cluster

%sql
SELECT country_code,
       country_name,
       ROUND(evi_main,3) AS evi,
       ROUND(dri,3) AS dri,
       ROUND(risk_gap,3) AS risk_gap
FROM labour_shock.country_year_index
WHERE year=2024
ORDER BY risk_gap DESC

paragraphs.text:
%sql
SELECT year,
       ROUND(evi_main,3) AS evi,
       ROUND(dri,3) AS dri,
       ROUND(risk_gap,3) AS risk_gap
FROM labour_shock.country_year_index
WHERE country_code='CHN'
ORDER BY year

%sql
SELECT year,
       ROUND(AVG(evi_main),3) AS avg_evi,
       ROUND(AVG(dri),3) AS avg_dri,
       ROUND(AVG(risk_gap),3) AS avg_risk_gap
FROM labour_shock.country_year_index
WHERE is_benchmark='False'
GROUP BY year
ORDER BY year

%sql
SELECT indicator_group,
       COUNT(*) AS row_count
FROM labour_shock.core_long
GROUP BY indicator_group
ORDER BY indicator_group

%sql
SELECT country_code,
       indicator_group,
       COUNT(*) AS row_count
FROM labour_shock.core_long
GROUP BY country_code, indicator_group
ORDER BY country_code, indicator_group

%sql
SELECT country_code,
       country_name,
       ROUND(evi_main_avg,3) AS evi_avg,
       ROUND(dri_avg,3) AS dri_avg,
       ROUND(risk_gap_avg,3) AS risk_gap_avg,
       cluster,
       cluster_label
FROM labour_shock.sea_cluster
ORDER BY cluster, country_code
